segments: الْكُفْوُ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَفِيفاً وَ عِنْدَهُ يَسَارٌ .
arabic.text: الْكُفْوُ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَفِيفاً وَ عِنْدَهُ يَسَارٌ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al hakam, from Aban, from a man,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The match is that he happens to be chaste, and with him is wealth’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al hakam, from Aban, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The match is that he happens to be chaste, and with him is wealth’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Proper match is one who is chaste and affluent.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Proper match is one who is chaste and affluent.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/48)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/48)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
